name: openclaw-clawglassos
description: Community OpenClaw channel plugin for ClawGlassOS — bridges Even Realities G2 smart glasses (via the ClawGlassOS WebView) to the OpenClaw gateway.

channel.label: ClawGlassOS (Even G2)
channel.blurb: Bridges Even Realities G2 smart glasses (via the ClawGlassOS WebView) to OpenClaw as a chat channel.
